reviews.review_text: Nice clean park, friendly helpful staff. Book in, you'll love it, I did, Eamon says good stuff
Wir wurden zehn Minuten nach "Schließung" mit Baby abgewiesen. Sorry, das geht gar nicht. Vermutlich sonst gut.

A great location, close enough to shops, facilities, museums and attractions whilst a good distance away from the main city to enjoy peace and quiet of the rural setting.
Clean and tidy, friendly staff and generous size of our one bedroom standard cabin.
Highly recommend this place.

Old but clean facilities. Only campground I’ve been after hundreds of stays where wifi is great! Quiet area, slab sites. Had great rest. Camp kitchen is great but not closed so cooking at night is not great with mozzies. The website didnt let me book but showed 38 for a site for one night one person. Since it didnt work I showed up to be told it would be 53 and the best she would do was 45. Rude and annoyed about it. Making me pay more and thinking thats a favour is really uncomfortable. It was already too late to go somewhere else so I had to accept.

My partner and I had a very pleasant stay in the standard balcony two-bedroom cabin pet-friendly. The accommodation was comfortable, spotless, and smelled lovely upon arrival. It offers good value for money, especially for a pet-friendly option.

Check-in and check-out were smooth and hassle-free. Working tv, the bedding was comfortable, the hot water had good pressure and temperature also the amenities were thoughtfully provided. Additionally, this accommodation also supplied coffees, teas, a variety of sugars, and milk in the fridge <3
Great rooms bbq amenities and pool only downfall for me was no public transport to Shepparton

A nice an pleasant location on the edge of town just a short drive to wherever you need to be,
The staff were simply amazing, cloe the manager was the most accomodating person I’ve dealt with in all my years of travels
I Will definitely be back in the future
Peace out ✌🏼👍🏽

Super stay ! The most friendliest and helpful staff. New to caravanning and staff helped guide us onto site . Beautiful green grassy sites , amenities very clean and user friendly ! We will definitely be back . Apes + T
We had a great time there.

we stayed in one of the pet friendly cabins which was perfect for us, the kids and our 2 dogs, we absolutely loved our stay and highly recommend this holiday park! the manager and her children were so welcoming and lovely and we all had a great time! the pool was beautiful too, we will definitely be back the next chance we get and with the rest of the family this time!
Overall great stay, staff are friendly cabins are nice and tidy and clean! Perfect little spot next time we will bring the kids.

Cabin was an absolute disgrace to any connection to a big4 holiday parks. The floor felt like it was going to fall in in places and the cabin had a massive lean to it. The bunkbeds had no grab handles for the kids to get up on them. The bed was as hard as a rock. The kitchen facilities were lack of. We put some food on the bench for less than 5 minutes and they were covered in ants. Let alone the most concerning issue the front sliding door, not even locking properly which is a massive safety feature that needs to be addressed ASAP.
The swimming pool was cloudy as anything and there was other families bringing glass and alcohol and drinking freely not abiding the rules at all and one of the ladies from the office walked past and saw this and did nothing.
Tennis course behind us. We had kids deliberately hitting the back of the cabin and even hit my car with balls and when we complained to the office it was never dealt with. We had the tennis courts being well used after 10pm and then started again at 6am which goes against the rules you have. When I tried to bring up some of our complaints with the office all I got told was to email you guys will never stay here again and will tell our friends to avoid the the place as well.

Cabin was an absolute disgrace to any connection to a big4 holiday parks. The floor felt like it was going to fall in in places and the cabin had a massive lean to it. The bunkbeds had no grab handles for the kids to get up on them. The bed was as hard as a rock. The kitchen facilities were lack of. We put some food on the bench for less than 5 minutes and they were covered in ants. Let alone the most concerning issue the front sliding door, not even locking properly which is a massive safety feature that needs to be addressed ASAP. |The swimming pool was cloudy as anything and there was other families bringing glass and alcohol and drinking freely not abiding the rules at all and one of the ladies from the office walked past and saw this and did nothing. |Tennis course behind us. We had kids deliberately hitting the back of the cabin and even hit my car with balls and when we complained to the office it was never dealt with. We had the tennis courts being well used after 10pm and then started again at 6am which goes against the rules you have. When I tried to bring up some of our complaints with the office all I got told was to email you guys will never stay here again and will tell our friends to avoid the the place as well.

We stayed in a Tradie van.
Brilliant! Clean, bed comfortable, everything needed within this space.
Excellent in all ways.
Staff are professional, personable, kind and helpful.
Highly recommend and only 4kms from Shepparton.

Me and my family have stayed at this caravan park frequently and each time have a superb experience. The amenities are always clean, the cabins are perfect and the staff are friendly. The new manager is approachable, knowledgeable about the area and extremely keen to help. A fantastic place to stay.

Camping grounds very clean An accessible
Very quite
very clean public facilities
Pool area very nice...great for kids
.............................

We had a wonderful stay in a 2 bedroom pet friendly cabin. We arrived later in the evening and the Shepparton Holiday Park message with the combination code to access the key from the lockbox. There key was with a map to the cabin which was clearly marked. They made the process so easy. The cabin was clean and suited our needs exactly. The kids were pleasantly surprised to find a small playground within the grounds and the staff I met as I was packing the car when friendly and cheerful. It seemed as if they enjoyed their roles which is a testament to the culture of the Park. We would definitely return.

I recently had the displeasure of staying in a cabin number 2 that was in a shocking state of disrepair. The bed cover and pillows were stained with blood, and the bathroom tiles were damaged and in desperate need of replacement. The cabin itself was extremely old and had clearly been neglected for a long time. The pool's early closing time of 5 pm was also a major drawback. To add insult to injury, the air conditioning in the cabin didn't work properly, and my request for toilet paper was ignored. Overall, my stay was a complete and utter waste of money, and I would never recommend this place to anyone and also too dusty 😡

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 5-Star Review

Our stay was absolutely fantastic thanks to Chloe and Kate! They went above and beyond to make everything smooth and comfortable for us. Their warm hospitality, attention to detail, and genuine care truly made us feel welcome.

A special thank you for providing us extra space for our Cold Rock Mobile trailer — this thoughtful gesture made a huge difference and we appreciate it more than words can say.

Chloe and Kate, you both are amazing. We couldn’t have asked for better hosts. Highly recommended! 🙌🍨💙

Great service from the manager. We appreciate all she has done for us. Beautiful well set out park. Just the right size and no overcrowding. Family friendly. Lots of room for the kids to play. Pet friendly. Would stay again.
Great little park. Older amenities but clean. Large grassed sites.

I haven't even stayed a whole night yet and I love it. Our cabin has everything we need - dishes, silverware, utensils, REAL milk provided for a cuppa. So quiet and everything is so clean and well kept. Very convenient to access and the after-hours check-in was very simple and personal. I feel safe and relaxed here. I would definitely recommend.

Awesome Staff, thank you so much for such a great stay. Your friendly welcoming service and being super accommodating made our stay Fantastic.
Great park, clean facilities and refreshing spotlessly clean pool.
Thank you for a great stay Nat, Cam and Oki.
Will definitely stay again when in town

We stayed on a powered site with a clean flat surface. The park is old but very well maintained and very clean. Facilities were spotless and the staff were kind and welcoming. They even offered a free BBQ just before the AFL Grand Final which was a thoughtful touch. The camp kitchen has a stove, large oven, several BBQs, a fridge, kettle and toaster, but no pans, pots or utensils. The entertainment room has a TV, sofa and a ping pong table, although it lacked games and felt quite empty. Overall it was a comfortable and enjoyable stay.
Unit 19 not good the room not clean s bad the sing bad ...the staff lovely ....iam sorry every think very old.....thanks

Shepparton Holiday Park and village—Highly Recommend

Stayed last night on our way to Geelong and was genuinely impressed. The new managers are switched on and motivated—you can feel they’re lifting the place. Sites were easy to get into, amenities were clean, and the shared camp kitchen is spot on for a quick feed after a long drive. Quiet at night, family-friendly vibe, and everything just works the way it should. Good value, good people. We’d happily stay again
The increase of sites by nearly $20.  Plus the upgrade of laundry costing $7.97 per wash and same dryer.  I thought was expensive.    Don't think we will be back.
Great accommodation in stayed in a small cabin it was perfect for our 2 night stay in shepparton
Good sized cabin, clean facilities and laundry.

We were a bit disappointed with our accommodation - the kitchen was well equipped, the lounge area, adequate. The air-conditioner sounded tired but worked. The toilet was difficult to access as it was really tight size-wise and the bedroom was similar. My biggest complaint was that the laundry was the most expensive I've ever used - and had to use credit card as the machines didn't take cash, consequently, was charged a card fee - I thought this most inappropriate.

This was my first solo holiday with my newborn and I'm so grateful to have found this caravan park! It felt safe and the accommodation was clean and had everything we needed. They even have a parents room with a bath! Loved it so much we've booked again for next month.

Fix the door lock on cabin 22, remove the bunk beds and put a small lounge in its place and make that area a small tv area, mount the tv to the wall up above the kitchen bench, check the power point left hand side of sink, the on off buttons are hard to move, put a table & chairs under the sun shade on the grassed area. And finally put bkankets or electric bkanket on the bed.
Was exactly what we were after ..clean room and awesome service.. would definitely use again..!
At 8:30 we were told to quiet down when we weren’t even loud, plus there is weirdos staring at us while we were changing.

Thank you for our stay at your caravan park everything fulfilled our expectations. Unfortunately I chose to park directly under a tree and was bombed accordingly. I will be more careful next time. We will be seeing you again around the end of April for another stay cheers kerry
very happy with the place. great family spaces to enjoy as well

Je tenais à partager mon expérience à ce camping.

Nous sommes 4 amis français et nous avions reversé pour 4 nuits dans ce camping.

De prime à bord, tout allait bien, mobilhome correct (malgré des gros traces sur les murs etc..) c’était amplement suffisant ! Le soir, étant 4 jeunes nous avons mit de la musique et discuter à l’extérieur… on est venu nous voir à 21h30 nous demandant de baisser le son, chose que nous avons faite (c’était le directeur du camping qui venait, car il habite dans le camping)

À 22h38, nous recevons un SMS de ce même directeur nous demandant de quitter le logement le lendemain à 10h. Nous rangeons tout et allons dormir pour essayer d’aller les voir le lendemain. Malheureusement, aucune discussion possible… malgré un message d’excuse, promesse que nous ferions s attention….

Donc retenez qu’à la moindre erreur, ou si vous ne respecter pas SCRUPULEUSEMENT les règles, vous serez viré, soyez calmes et disciplinés…

Très déçu de ce directeur qui est totalement incompréhensif et ne devrait pas tenir un camping s’ils préfèrent virer tout le monde à la moindre erreur…

Mention spéciale pour l’hôtesse d’accueil qui elle était très gentille, souriante et bienveillante à notre égard.

Bref fuyez !

Although the place is clean and the staff is friendly, I strongly recommend that you avoid this establishment. We had booked for four nights but were kicked out on the first night for “noise disturbances.”

I am a very respectful person, and I was shocked by the decision of the campsite director. The rules clearly state that no noise is allowed after 10 PM. We were simply listening to music at a low volume in the early evening. At 9 PM, he came to ask us to turn it down. No problem, we complied. We went to bed around 10:30 PM (admittedly, we lost track of time), yet we received a message informing us of our definitive expulsion. All of this for just 30 minutes, without any real disturbance on our part.

We sincerely apologized and promised to be impeccable moving forward, but it didn’t change anything. After reading previous reviews from people who had experienced the same situation, I am convinced that the director is acting abusively.

Moreover, he didn’t even bother to get up the next morning to handle the refund himself, leaving the task to the receptionist (who, to be fair, was lovely). He replies to every review just to create a false sense of professionalism and to make people feel like they must “follow the rules.”

If you still decide to go, be aware that you’ll be dealing with an unstable person who films guests as “proof” and kicks people out for something as minor as jumping into the pool.

Seriously, avoid this place—trust me.
Nice place, clean and tidy.

Beautiful park well maintained
The staff are friendly and helpful.
Love the soft bath mats a nice touch.
Facilities clean and well maintained.
The best park I've stayed in travelling Australia.  Thank you.

Road noise unpleasant
Rooms very small and hard to navigate
Wouldn’t stay again
Very nice

We had an extremely disappointing experience during our stay. The staff was rude and displayed clear discrimination, which made the entire visit unpleasant. Basic politeness, fairness, and proper customer service were entirely lacking.  ||Holidays and outings are supposed to be enjoyable and relaxing, but staying here felt more like being in a jail. Despite charging high prices, the service provided was absolutely subpar and unacceptable.  ||We would not recommend this place to anyone. If you're looking for a pleasant experience, this is not the place to go. Save your money and choose somewhere else where guests are treated with respect and care.

We stay in a poolside cabin. The cabin was cool on arrival with aircon on for a hot day. The cabin was very clean and tidy with everything you needed. Close to the pool which was very clean and lovely and cool. The grounds were well look after by the lovely manger who takes time to look after everything. Always up for a chat. We will be staying again, thank you
Got kicked out of the pool for jumping in and was told we cant have a ball in the water.

NEVER EVER WILL BOOK HERE DISGUSTING HAD NO AIRCON WASN'T ADVISED THIS APON BOOKING THEN THEY HAD THE NERVE TO MESSAGE ME A DAY BEFORE ARRIVAL THERE IS NO AIRCON IF I HAD KNOWN I WOULD OF PAID $10 MORE NEVER AGAIN SHOULD BE FINED FOR NOT HAVING AIRCON IN EVERY CABIN ALSO I STAYED 10 MINUTES ONLY I TOOK MY FAMILY TO ANOTHER PARK WHICH WAS CHEAPER AND HAD AIRCON DONT BOOK HERE I WISH I DIDN'T HAVE TO EVEN GIVE 1 STAR DEFINITELY DONT DESERVE ANY
There certainly are better holiday parks at better price
Best showers. Strong flow , curtain  and soft mat to keep dressing area dry.

Decent room. Aircon works well, some units don’t have them… would definitely need it during Spring/Summer.

Fridge was set too cold and froze my $60 worth of groceries.

Was a good overall experience :)

Extremely Disappointing Experience

Rating: 0/5 stars

I'm writing to express my extreme disappointment and frustration with our recent experience at Shepparton Holiday Park and Village. The accommodation was only suitable for four people.
We had to find alternative arrangements for one of our family members, which was inconvenient and stressful. However, the real issue arose when we discovered that the receptionist had cancelled our booking without notifying us. She assumed we had simply walked out, which was not the case.

This lack of communication and professionalism is unacceptable. We were left feeling frustrated, disappointed, and disrespected. The receptionist's actions demonstrated a clear lack of regard for our time, money, and well-being.

I would strongly advise others to avoid this Holiday Park due to their poor customer service and unprofessional behavior. There are plenty of other Holiday Park that value their customers and provide a much better experience.

Wasn't to bad, the cabin didn't look like the pictures on the inside at least. And had a slight musty Smell walking in. But fixed that by opening a window. I booked the studio cabin but seems like I got the budget one instead. Either way the bed was comfy and I had a okay experience. Will be back if I actually get the studio cabin next lol

I recently stayed at Shepperton Holiday Park and Village , and unfortunately, my experience was marred by unprofessional staff behavior and serious concerns about privacy violations. From the moment I arrived, the staff seemed uninterested in assisting guests, offering little to no guidance about the amenities or rules of the site. When I had questions, their responses were curt, and on more than one occasion, I encountered rude and dismissive behavior.

However, the most troubling aspect was the breach of privacy. One of the staff member took my cabin pictures when i was outside at midnight but my family members were sleeping inside the cabin. It became apparent that the campsite was not adhering to its own privacy policy. I was also concerned about how my data was being stored, as there was no transparency about security measures in place.

The combination of poor customer service and disregard for privacy left me feeling uncomfortable and uneasy throughout my stay. For a place that promotes a relaxing getaway in nature, this experience was far from stress-free. I would strongly recommend looking elsewhere if you're seeking a professional, secure, and welcoming environment.

We have often stayed on a powered caravan site. ALL of the staff were extremely friendly and we have seen vast improvements over the years. The toilets and showers are older but very clean. Staff were making a conscious effort to keep the grass sites green.  Lots of bird life and very pleasant atmosphere.  Will definitely be back. Top job to
all who work there.
Very good park. We always go for soccer tournament and stay there as location is very good

Weekend stay, arrived Friday afternoon,check out Sunday. Poolside cabin. Staff were friendly & very helpful. The cabin was pre heated before our arrival, a positive start to our stay,  The weather was extremely cold during our stay. The split system worked well heating the rooms.The main room had a queen side bed with privacy sliding doors. Bedroom 2 had 3 bunk beds, great for kids. Kitchen had standard equipment to make meals, stove top only, no oven. Microwave, large fridge. Bathroom, toilet was a little close to the wall. Plenty of blankets to keep warm & linen. Couch was a little uncomfortable & hard. WiFi. Pin entry for car security & close Parking to the cabin. Overall cost for our stay was reasonable. Cabin improvements & renovations would be great addition to the overall comforts. Great location, only 6 minutes to town of Shepparton. I left my laptop & bag in the cabin, staff assistant was prompt & safety secured our property until we returned to pick up our items. Thank you to the management team & staff at Shepparton Holiday Park & Village.😊

Nice n quite place but not far from main attractions. Good facilities like tennis court, swimming pool and games room.
Great place to stay if visiting shepparton and around. It's getting some renovation so might get some more improvement on near future.

My partner and I recently stayed in a poolside cabin, unfortunately my experience was less than satisfactory. The cabin was extremely cold, not clean, and had a terrible smell. The beds were very uncomfortable making it difficult to get a good night's sleep. The bedding is not acceptable for the cold weather. Additionally, there were an excessive amount of rules that made the stay feel restrictive.

Furthermore, the laundry facilities did not time accurately. The laundry facilities itself was clean and tidy.

Overall, I was disappointed with my experience at this caravan park and would recommend that management take steps to improve the quality of their facilities and services.
Very friendly staff, clean rooms and nice facilities.

We stay for one night and had to check in office hours. The service desk ensured we find our key safely on arrival and all the necessary details.

The rooms were clean and we were really happy with overall service. Thanks to the staff on-site who are always trying to resolve any issue.

Have a powered site , great park , very quiet but handy to shops etc .

Recommend

Friendly staff. I stayed about a week and found the place convenient and, apart from a little road noise, quiet. Plenty of room to park both my trailer and car next to my cabin.
I'll stay again next time I need somewhere in Shepparton.

Have just finished hour week long stay here with our caravan and I can definitely say you will not be disappointed with staying here, friendly owners, amenities are absolutely immaculate! Grassed sites, everything is just so clean and tidy, all the time! About 5 minutes from town centre. If we pass through again, this will be our go to accomodation!

I was in Shepparton for a week for Tafe and found the accommodation nice and quiet to suit my studies. Out of town, but close enough to the tafe and close to food outlets and shops if I needed them. Cabins were older but well maintained.
Will be booking again for my next week of courses. Thank you

I occasionally get sent to Shepparton for work I choose this park for the price $88 the cabin was cold and dirty but I left the heater on for the day . It was nice and warm the second night so I booked again the following week and bought my dog. This was a much nicer cabin .Within 5 minutes of arriving he knocked at my door and asked me to leave as it was against the rules I apologised as I hadn’t read the policy and I had confused the it with the big 4 ( this is pet friendly cabins) I was very sorry as he mentioned people have allergies and my dog was in the cabin for less than 5 minutes. I was still charged the full rate for 2 nights then accused of stealing the tv remote????||Unbelievable . So rude if you are looking for a lovely caravan park with friendly helpful staff go to big 4 park lane they are lovely ❤️what a stuff up I made 🙄||||I was in the wrong ||however I was made to feel like a criminal and I could have easily popped my dog in his crate in the car for the night, now having read a number of other reviews I see this park are very strict on rules and a number of people make comments on this and negative experience with the manager. It certainly wasn’t my first choice of accommodation but you get what you pay for or in my case you don’t.😂

We had a great stay and was really impressed with the little touches like the lovely hand soap and shampoo and conditioner, the other great thing was that everything we needed to keep the cabin tidy and clean was provided, the smart TV and free WiFi were also great.10/10 would highly recommend 👌
Fantastic park, helpful and friendly, great ammenities, especially the camp kitchens / bbq areas.

We stayed 1 night only out of 3 nights the manager kick us out just because of extra 1 toddler at age of 1 year 10months. At the same time my friends e of them came to visit, when they come the manager approached them and said our cabin is already full of people staying in and too many people, he spoke without motion to check. Hey man they just visit!! We talked about it but the manager were not considerate about this and it was very noticeable that the management at this place is not a kid friendly. For anyone who with big family this is not a right place. Worse.
Not very good service, highly not recommended I will never come to this place again!!  especially for the Manager is very rude to us! 👎🏼
The worse and fussy place I ever stayed. Not considerate and Not a kid friendly .

This place is the worse, The receptionist was VERY rude to my family. They kicked us out because there were many people in the room. I do not consider this hotel if you have a very big family. I had an event happening and my auntie was helping her friend with makeup, and the receptionist came to our room and told us to leave because there were more than 5 people in the room. My parents were stressed out by their attitude, I hope no one experience this kind of bad behaviour from a receptionist.

i was really disappointed that there wasn’t any disabled facilities - do disabled toilet and no disabled bathroom/shower facilities, especially when i’d said on a number of occasions that i wanted a site close to the amenities because of mobility issues. no one ever said during those conversations that there weren’t any facilities for disabled guests. |lovely place - basic, clean.

Accommodation was clean and tidy bedsitter style but perfect for a couple and reasonably priced. Staff were helpful and friendly. Park facilities were good. Food was a drive away though as it is in a bit of an industrial area a bit out of town. Overall we are happy.

Recently stayed here on a grass site  facilities were very clean and they even supplied soft bath mats the facilities were very nice and garden well  maintained. There was a  brief power outage in the area and the care taker went around to everyone to inform them. There was a group of  golfers that came in and he guided them all into their designated parks. Very enjoyable

Rang to book a powered site for one night on our way home to NSW
Staff were very helpful
Site great
Amenities very clean
Disappointed compared to many other parks we stayed for this premium price, constantly being reminded of rules by caretaker, filthy swimming pool and dated unchecked amenities, bad vibes from day one

Cabin was ordinary. Blinds broken and very dusty. Bedroom floors haven't had a good vacuum in a long time, AC is definitely not very cold, fridge stunk of rotten meat, main stove burner kept going out, TV reception kept going out every night, shower went from cold to scolding hot and the bed...you could feel the springs pushing through.

I don’t even know where to start… The whole place is just a mess. Kitchen shuts off earlier then described. Tennis court is closed despite being functional. Basketball court is just a basketball net. Manager is extremely rude and acts like the fun police. Bad place for workers and definitely a no-go for a family stay!!

The Shepparton Holiday Villiage is in a good Location, close to main facilities.|Excellent value for money for the family travelling on a budget. Family and kid Friendly park.|The Cabins were clean, Staff were friendly and helpful, overall great experience.

I'm not even sure where to start with this review. We booked 2 cabins as we're a big group and instead of putting us close to each other, we were put across the road from each other which made absolutely no sense as it rained a couple of days which meant we were walking across pools of water to get to each other. The cabins are old and run down and in dire need of a DEEP clean! There were droppings of some sort all over the place, the showers have mould and one of the showers had a cracked floor! One cabin had lights that weren't working, the other didn't even have a curtain in the main area so at night when the lights were on, everyone could see right through the cabin! The "recreation room" is just a room with an old table tennis table and 3 couches that need to be steam cleaned. The tennis court was closed the entire time. The basketball court is barely a court. There is no jumping pillow. The pool times are 9am-6pm even though the paper given to you on arrival says it's open from 9am-sunset. Overall, we enjoyed the pool and meeting so many lovely people.

Great caravan park. Stayed in my van for a month. Quiet location. Felt very safe as a single female. Managers very helpful and friendly. Well maintained grounds. Bathrooms and camp kitchen were super clean every day. I will definitely return visit.

We’re staying at this park now .
Managers are super friendly , nothing is too much trouble .
Love that it’s dog friendly.
Showers yes are old but very clean with bath that I’ve only seen once before at another park . .
A little out of town which suits , not a lot of road noise.
Would definitely comeback and stay again .
Not too busy, nice and clean, close to shopping centre and close drive to town
I booked a room for 3 nights and for the convenience, price and location, it was great! It was a good atmosphere and was peaceful, will be coming again!

Great place to stay.
We stayed a week in our caravan.
Good location, It’s a bit out of town which we liked for the security of our stuff. Staff were very friendly and accomodating.
Showers were hot and clean.
I would recommend this caravan park for anyone to stay we enjoyed our weeks stay here and wouldn’t hesitate to go back

There is good and bad with staying here. Staff were friendly and it's got good facilities if you have kids (pool, playground, rec room, etc.
Plenty of shade.
But the shower/toilet block is well past it's used by date and I had one hot shower in three days. Camp kitchen stove was barely working.
I can see no justification to charge $75 a night for a powered site!! $50 would be a lot more realistic for what it has and it's location.
Hope the owners consider lowering the rates to a get what you pay for deal.

We had a great comfortable stay, the only thing I can really say negative about it is there aren't many cooking facilities or pots and pans apart from that it's a great place very quiet and we'll maintained, will definitely be back
We love it here the pool is out favourite , beds are super comfy. It's our 3rd time staying there we love it and keep coming back thank you for the lovely service

STAY AWAY FROM THIS PLACE.
The managers of this caravan park are the most miserable people I have ever met.
Verbally abusing kids for just being kids, not aloud to play on play equipment. Were told to be quiet while playing at 7pm. All being spoken to by a horrible cranky angry man.
I feel like I want to place charges it was that bad. We rang the police.
My wife was drawn to tears and verbally abused by Warren.
This is the worst caravan park we have ever stayed at and we have been caravanning and camping for 8 years.

Apart from the abuse by Warren, I have nothing good to say, it’s a run down dusty dirt park out of town.
Do not stay here…
We moved parks and found another park in town- nicer park, friendly people and paved roads for the kids to ride bikes and scooters
Great place to stay . Rooms were nice and clean . Thank you for a stay.
Easy to navigate, receptionist was lovely, helpful and accomodating. Communal amenities block was clean and tidy, large bbq area.

Very friendly accomadating staff.
Nice grounds, well maintained clean amenities.
Pleasant staff, grassed sites, clean ammenities. Reasonable price
I stayed for 2 nights. The room was clean and very comfortable. I would definitely stay again

I stayed there for work once.
And now that’s the only place I stay when I’m working in Shepparton
Older park but very clean and tidy. Friendly staff. Would stay again.

Great little place, cabins were reasonable sized although mattresses weren’t good.
Facilities and amenities were great, everything needed for a few nights stay.

Easy to find, clean rooms and well looked after. Communication was excellent, kids also loved the playground.

Great place to stay . Loved the showers and shower Mats nice and soft not those rubber holy ones.
If U love a cold pool then U will love this one .
Can't comment on the rooms as we were in our caravan.
Very nice park owners/caretakers.

I stayed in one of the new cabins for approximately 9 months after my property was flooded. I found it to be very clean.  Management and staff were very friendly and helpful. I would rate the accommodation more highly than many of the more expensive motels in the area and as such, excellent value for money.  I would highly recommend.
Great welcome for both myself and some members of my family.  Thank you for a lovely stay.
Best showers of any park we’ve ever stayed at! Great people, simple easy booking, lovely green powered sites and well appointed camp kitchen.
Lovely peaceful park and the management was extremely helpful
I came to relax and unwind and it was perfect. The caravan was very clean. You will find everything you need for cooking. The bedding is comfortable.
Cosy cabin with nice clean linen and bathrooms
Disgusted. Quick to take money but god forbid you get sick not a care in the world.
Lovely management always clean and well maintained cabins. Highly recommend a stay
Stayed in the caravan section for 2 nights, great facility for a large caravan. Amenities clean and well maintained.
Very good a nd clean shame there wasn't a disable toilet and shower

Spent two nights here this week. Friendly efficient customer service and help before I arrived after hours. Good grassy site with concrete pad and plenty of trees.

Amenities not new but spotless and a great shower.

🙏

Stayed in a budget cabin which should be closed down, there is no excuse for dirt , mould on the ceiling in the wardrobe area , a empty shampoo bottle pushed into the exhaust fan in the bathroom, dirt around the shower.   Would not recommend staying at this park . Caretaker's only comment was that the cabin was old & that he would speak with head office , sorry he is the caretaker he should be aware of the state of the cabins.
